title: artemisia norvegica subsp. glomerata
intro: Artemisia norvegica subsp. glomerata, also known as Norwegian mugwort, is a subspecies of the mugwort plant native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Norwegian mugwort include alleviating digestive problems, reducing menstrual cramps, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Norwegian mugwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
